g.text: break; /* NO → S2 → S3: CLOSE, token done */

text.tspan: /* c != '\'' → S1 self-loop: stay IN_STRING, span grows */
/* S1: IN_STRING — entered after consuming opening quote */
/* peek: next char also a quote? */

g.text: 2 | i | IN_STRING → IN_STRING | non-quote: advance span
3 | t | IN_STRING → IN_STRING | non-quote: advance span
4 ★ | ' | IN_STRING → POSSIBLE_END | quote — escape or close?
6 | s | IN_STRING → IN_STRING | non-quote: advance span
12 ★ | ' | IN_STRING → POSSIBLE_END | quote — escape or close?
RESULT | TOKEN_STRING · decoded = it's a test · raw = 'it''s a test'
ESCAPE | peek = QUOTE | advance both → stay IN_STRING, decoded += '
CLOSE | peek != QUOTE | leave char in stream → emit TOKEN_STRING
KEY: 1st quote always enters POSSIBLE_END — never consumed directly

div.p: 🔵 Blue = S1 IN_STRING (hot path) 🟡 Yellow = S2 POSSIBLE_END (decision) 🟢 Dbl-ring = S3 DONE (accepting state) 🔴 Red = S4 ERROR (unterminated) ★ = critical escape-detection step
